response: Wheel of time turns, wheel of history spins, wheel of memory echoes. Wheel of slavery's cruelty, wheel of oppression's weight, wheel of suffering's depth. Wheel of Frederick Douglass's life, wheel of his enslavement, wheel of his struggle. Wheel of his medical history, wheel of his physical ailments, wheel of his endurance. Wheel of wounds, wheel of scars, wheel of silent pain. Wheel of neglect, wheel of brutality, wheel of forced labor. Wheel of disease, wheel of malnutrition, wheel of lack of care. Wheel of the overseer's whip, wheel of the master's indifference, wheel of the system's cruelty. Wheel of his resilience, wheel of his strength, wheel of his spirit. Wheel of his escape, wheel of his freedom, wheel of his legacy. Wheel of history remembers, wheel of justice demands, wheel of truth endures.
